violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
Cheese in the 4dr cooler was observed with mold and black residue.PIC voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the (hood vents and food storage shelves in walk in cooler and 4 dr reach in ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

Unnecessary, non-functional equipment, litter, and/or items were observed in the (outside back) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The following physical facilities observed in poor repair: 1.hole observed near back door. 2.ceiling has exposed insulation. 3.ceilings in bathroom observed with missing tile. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The floors in walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
